#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

long long common_prefix(const string& a, const string& b) {
    long long len = 0;
    while (len < a.size() && len < b.size() && a[len] == b[len]) {
        ++len;
    }
    return len;
}

vector<long long> solve(vector<string> words) {
    int n = words.size();
    if (n == 0) return {};
    vector<long long> prefix(n-1, 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < n-1; ++i) {
        prefix[i] = common_prefix(words[i], words[i+1]);
    }
    vector<long long> left_max(n, 0);
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        left_max[i] = max(left_max[i-1], prefix[i-1]);
    }
    vector<long long> right_max(n, 0);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        right_max[i] = max(prefix[i], right_max[i+1]);
    }
    vector<long long> answer(n, 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        long long left_part = (i == 0) ? 0 : left_max[i-1];
        long long right_part = (i == n-1) ? 0 : right_max[i+1];
        long long new_pair = 0;
        if (i > 0 && i < n-1) {
            new_pair = common_prefix(words[i-1], words[i+1]);
        }
        answer[i] = max(left_part, right_part, new_pair);
    }

def solve(words)

  (1...n).each do |i|

  end

  right_max = Array.new(n, 0)
  right_max[n-1] = prefix[n-2] if n > 1
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|

  end

end

using namespace std;

long long common_prefix(const string& a, const string& b) {

    while (len < a.size() && len < b.size() && a[len] == b[len]) {

    }

vector<long long> solve(vector<string> words) {
    int n = words.size();
    if (n == 0) return {};
    vector<long long> prefix(n-1, 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < n-1; ++i) {
        prefix[i] = common_prefix(words[i], words[i+1]);
    }
    vector<long long> left_max(n, 0);
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        left_max[i] = max(left_max[i-1], prefix[i-1]);
    }
    vector<long long> right_max(n, 0);
    for (int i = n-2; i >= 0; --i) {
        right_max[i] = max(prefix[i], right_max[i+1]);
    }
    vector<long long> answer(n, 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        long long left_part = (i == 0) ? 0 : left_max[i-1];
        long long right_part = (i == n-1) ? 0 : right_max[i+1];
        long long new_pair = 0;
        if (i > 0 && i < n-1) {
            new_pair = common_prefix(words[i-1], words[i+1]);
        }
        answer[i] = max(left_part, right_part, new_pair);
    }
    return answer;
}
